title: Aspect Tweaker
description: CraftTweaker add-on for Minecraft 1.10.2 and Thaumcraft 6
body:
Aspect Tweaker is a CraftTweaker add-on for Minecraft 1.10.2 and Thaumcraft 6. It was originally created to modify Thaumcraft aspects, but now also allows overriding Thaumcraft research. For 1.7.10 and 1.12.2, please instead use ModTweaker.

Please note that Aspect Tweaker is not regularly developed, and as such I cannot provide a roadmap or ETA on any features or fixes.
